items.title: US plans to fight flesh-eating screwworm outbreak with flies and dogs
items.dek: The insect, which has been found in America for the first time since 1966, is a growing concern in the southern US.
items.body: The insect, which has been found in America for the first time since 1966, is a growing concern in the southern US.

items.title: How Trump's White House ballroom plan has doubled in size and cost over a year
